info.title: SWEA API
info.description:
SWEA API for interest rates and exchange rates

See our [FAQ](https://www.riksbank.se/sv/statistik/rantor-och-valutakurser/hamta-rantor-och-valutakurser-via-api/fragor-och-svar-om-apiet-for-rantor-och-valutakurser/) for more information of how to use the API.

Disclaimer

The exchange rates are indicative only and are published by the Riksbank for information purposes. They should therefore not be used for transactional purposes.

Reservation

The Riksbank disclaims liability for any errors or changes in values afterwards and for any interruptions in the functioning of the website and the API:s that may affect access to the statistics.
The Riksbank reserves the right to make updates/changes to the website and the API:s that may affect the downloading of statistics.
More information on the Riksbank's [website](https://www.riksbank.se/en-gb/statistics/interest-rates-and-exchange-rates/retrieving-interest-rates-and-exchange-rates-via-api).

get.description: Swedish banking day(s) starting with {from} ending with today.

Swedish banking day(s) starting with {from} ending with {to}. 
Results for future dates will be limited to todays date + 365 days.
Exchange rate calculated against the Swedish krona (SEK), with the result shown as the rate between two foreign currencies.

parameters.name: seriesId1
parameters.description: The identifier for the origin series of the cross rate.

parameters.name: seriesId2
parameters.description: The identifier for the target series of the cross rate.

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.description: The type of aggregation that will be applied to the result. Available aggregates W(eekly), M(onthly), Q(uarterly), Y(early).

parameters.name: seriesId1

parameters.name: aggregation

get.description: Logical groupings of related series.
List the groups that is associated with the {groupId}.
ObservationAggregates with a period starting with {from} and ending today

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.description: The type of aggregation that will be applied to the result. Available aggregates W(eekly), M(onthly), Q(uarterly), Y(early).

get.description: Gets the aggregates.

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.description: The type of aggregation that will be applied to the result. Available aggregates W(eekly), M(onthly), Q(uarterly), Y(early).

get.description: Gets ObservationAggregates for a {groupid} with a period starting with {from} and ending today. Data is only returned for a maximum of 1 year unless aggregates Y or Q is used.

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.description: The type of aggregation that will be applied to the result. Available aggregates W(eekly), M(onthly), Q(uarterly), Y(early).

get.description: Gets the aggregates by groupId. Data is only returned for a maximum of 1 year unless aggregates Y or Q is used.

parameters.name: aggregation
parameters.description: The type of aggregation that will be applied to the result. Available aggregates W(eekly), M(onthly), Q(uarterly), Y(early).

get.description: Gets observations for a {series} with a period starting with {from} and ending with today.
Gets observations for a {series} with a period starting with {from} and ending with {to}.
Gets observations for a {groupid} with a period starting with {from} and ending with today. Data is only returned for a maximum of 1 year. Only five calls per minute are allowed.
Gets observations for a {groupid} with a period starting with {from} and ending with {to}. Data is only returned for a maximum of 1 year. Only five calls per minute are allowed.
Gets the latest observation for the {seriesId}.
Gets the latest observation for all series for the provided {groupId}.
All series.
Get information about the series with the specified {seriesId}.
Get information about the series within the specified {groupId}.
Exchange rate series.

calendarDate.description: The date of the day in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

swedishBankday.description: Is true if the Calendar Date is a Swedish bank day.

weekYear.description: The year the WeekNumber belongs to.

weekNumber.description: The week of the year according to the ISO 8601 standard.

ultimo.description: True if the Calendar day is the last bankday in the month.

date.description: Exchange rate date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

seqNr.description: The index of the aggregates placement within the year.

childGroups.description: Other groups that have the current Group as parent.

date.description: The date for the Observation in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

seqNr.description: The index of the aggregates placement within the year.

from.description: The start date of the aggregate.

to.description: The end date of the aggregate.

average.description: The average value for the period, when weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual aggregate is selected.

min.description: The minimum value for the period, when weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual aggregate method is selected.

max.description: The maximum value for the period, when weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual aggregate method is selected.

ultimo.description: The value for the last bank day or the last value in the aggregation period if no observation exist for the last bank day.

observationCount.description: Number of observations used as source for given aggregate method.

seqNr.description: The index of the aggregates placement within the year.

from.description: The start date of the aggregate.

to.description: The end date of the aggregate.

average.description: The average value for the period, when weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual aggregate is selected.

min.description: The minimum value for the period, when weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual aggregate method is selected.

max.description: The maximum value for the period, when weekly, monthly, quarterly or annual aggregate method is selected.

ultimo.description: The value for the last bank day or the last value in the aggregation period if no observation exist for the last bank day.

observationCount.description: Number of observations used as source for given aggregate method.

date.description: The date for the Observation in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

source.description: The original source for the observations in the Series.

shortDescription.description: A short description of the Series.

midDescription.description: A medium-long description of the Series.

longDescription.description: A long description of the Series.

groupId.description: The group identifier of the Group that the Series belong to.

observationMaxDate.description: Date for the last Observation in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

observationMinDate.description: Date for the first observation in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD.

seriesClosed.description: Is true if the Series is closed and no more observations is added to the Series.
